TABLE DOD_VPAYMENT_METHODS(
  row_id,                -- primary key

  codenabled,            -- COD enabled Y/N
  upienabled,            -- UPI enabled Y/N
  walletenabled,         -- wallet enabled Y/N
  paylaterenabled,       -- pay later enabled Y/N
  payprovidersenabled,  -- gateway payments enabled

  vendor_id,             -- vendor id
  active_flag,           -- Y/N active
  deleted_state,         -- soft delete
  tenant_id,
  created
)
